title: KandyToys Dinosaur Fossils Digging and Excavation Kit | Dig Out Your Own Glow in The Dark Skeleton | History Science Kit | Gift For Kids
features: Dig out 6 Glow in the Dark Dinosaur Fossils – A fantastic, hands on activity for any young dinosaur lover; kids can dig out and discover 6 different glow in the dark skeletons. An educational, fun way to satisfy curious minds and keep youngsters occupied.

Each of the 6 Glow in the Dark skeletons have been preserved in plaster blocks, giving kids hours of entertainment as they learn to be a fossil hunter! Spark an interest in archaeology or palaeontology! Excavate different dinos and feel like a real life palaeontologist!
The Dinosaur Fossil Kit includes; 3 Plaster Blocks with 2 Dinosaurs to find in each; Mallet; Chisel and a Dust Cleaning Brush.
The full colour box makes a great gift for dinosaur mad children, who can dig and explore prehistoric figures at home
description: Product Description Dinosaur Fossils Digging and Excavation Kit Dig Out Your Own Glow in The Dark Dinosaur Skeleton Find 6 mystery glow in the dark dinosaurs! Get hands on and feel like a real-life explorer as you dig out your very own dinosaur skeletons. Educational and fun - spark an interest in archaeology and palaeontology. This kit makes an ideal gift for any dinosaur fan. Screen free play! Each Plaster Block contains 6 Glow in the Dark Dinosaurs Box Contains: 3 x Plaster Blocks Mallet Chisel Dust Cleaning Brush 3 Blocks to try! 3 Different Blocks to Smash open! This kit comes with three different plaster blocks to dig into, and each block has 2 Dinosaurs inside, break open the blocks to uncover 6 Dinosaur Skeletons. Feel like a real-life explorer as you discover each new Dinosaur Glow in the Dark! 6 Mystery Glowing Dinosaurs! Dig out six mystery land-based dinosaurs. Free the Dinosaurs from the plaster block, brush them off and sit them under a bright light for a few minutes, then flip off the lights and watch your new dinosaurs glow! Get Stuck in! Everything you need to dig in to the rocks is provided. Use the Mallet and Chisel to break into the rocks, and chip away smaller pieces. Brush of debris and dust with the cleaning brush when you get closer to the gems! KandyToys have a huge range of both toys and brands brought to you with over 40 years of experience under our belts. But we're still big kids at heart! We've got everything from Dinosaurs to Unicorns, and all sorts in between! Whether it's fun indoors or out in the sunshine, we've got something for everyone.
